ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the menu item belongs to */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories in the menu item */,
  "nutritional_info" TEXT /* Nutritional information of the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the menu item (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the territory is located */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the territory */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the territory */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the territory */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "price_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "price_amount" REAL /* Price amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the price expires */,
  "vat_inclusive" INTEGER /* Indicates if VAT is included in the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_prices_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory where the promotion is active */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., students, families) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_items" (
  "promotion_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion item link */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_items_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., THB, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., Thai Baht, US Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate_to_usd" REAL /* Exchange rate to US Dollar */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the currency (e.g., ฿, $) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, corporate executive) */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory the user is associated with */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., login, logout, view menu) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Customer rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the menu item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the menu item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the item reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_suppliers" (
  "menu_item_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item supplier link */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_suppliers_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
